description: Implement the StorageBackend trait for SQLite using rusqlite or sqlx-sqlite. Schema: tasks, workflows, requirements, decisions, checkpoints, agent_runs tables. Use migrations (refinery or sqlx-migrate). Store JSON blobs for complex nested fields (checklist, evidence, metadata) with indexed columns for filterable fields (status, priority, assignee, created_at). SQLite file lives at .ao/state/ao.db. Supports single-user and CI environments without external dependencies. Include WAL mode for concurrent read performance.
title: Add SQLite storage backend implementation
